_comment: Golden sha256 pin for Skill 51's SACRED structure files (Skill 6 U98, D1 binding ruling — voice governed, structure preserved). Generated by `blend_voice_governance.py --hash-structure` at the commit that introduced blend voice governance. tests/unit/u98-blend-governs-product-voice-engines.test.py asserts these stay byte-identical; a legitimate future structural edit MUST regenerate this file in the SAME commit as the structural edit (never silently) and that commit must NOT also touch the voice-path files, per U98 acceptance criterion (c)'s CI separation.
